mapper.select: SELECT ca.apply_number AS applyNumber, c.care_number AS careNumber, c.care_title AS careTitle, c.care_post AS careContent, c.care_date AS careDate, NVL(s.shelter_name, u.user_nickname) AS shelterName FROM ddd_care_apply ca JOIN ddd_care c ON ca.care_number = c.care_number JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number LEFT JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON c.user_number = s.user_number WHERE ca.user_number = #{userNumber} ORDER BY ca.apply_number DESC
